hero.title: AI Engineer
hero.subtitle: LLM systems in production · on-prem GenAI · Document AI
hero.description: I ship LLM systems to production. Sole engineer of an on-prem document-AI platform inside a bank, and creator of OpisAI — a commercial AI assistant built solo and sold. Real ML since 2016, in production since 2024.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm an AI Engineer who ships LLM systems to production — from on-prem GenAI in regulated environments to my own commercial product, OpisAI. Strong production-engineering foundation (Python, Java/Spring, cloud) and real ML roots since 2016.

contact.cardText: Feel free to reach out for job opportunities, collaborations, or just to say hello. I'm always interested in new projects and challenges!
